Devin Askew

Position: Guard

6-3, 198lb (190cm, 89kg)

Hometown: Sacramento, CA

High School: Mater Dei HS

RSCI Top 100: 28 (2020)

Schools: Kentucky (Men), Texas (Men), California (Men), Long Beach State (Men) and Villanova (Men)

  • 2025-26 Big East 6MOY
